'''zadhaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackeriness|crackeriness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackeriness|crackeriness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadhaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhæzæth|zædhæzæth]] || [[word:zædhæzæj|zædhæzæj]] || [[word:zædhæzæsh|zædhæzæsh]] || [[word:zædhæzæ|zædhæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhadhazath|zadhadhazath]] || [[word:zadhadhazaj|zadhadhazaj]] || [[word:zadhadhazash|zadhadhazash]] || [[word:zadhadhaza|zadhadhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhazath|zadhazath]] || [[word:zadhazaj|zadhazaj]] || [[word:zadhazash|zadhazash]] || [[word:zadhaza|zadhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhafzath|zadhafzath]] || [[word:zadhafzaj|zadhafzaj]] || [[word:zadhafzash|zadhafzash]] || [[word:zadhafzaf|zadhafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhazatha|zadhazatha]] || [[word:zadhazaja|zadhazaja]] || [[word:zadhazasha|zadhazasha]] || [[word:zadhazaka|zadhazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhazath|zadhazath]] || [[word:zadhazaj|zadhazaj]] || [[word:zadhazash|zadhazash]] || [[word:zadhaza|zadhaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhazathal|zadhazathal]] || [[word:zadhazajal|zadhazajal]] || [[word:zadhazashal|zadhazashal]] || [[word:zadhazakal|zadhazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhazathatha|zadhazathatha]] || [[word:zadhazajaja|zadhazajaja]] || [[word:zadhazashasha|zadhazashasha]] || [[word:zadhazaka|zadhazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhazathan|zadhazathan]] || [[word:zadhazajan|zadhazajan]] || [[word:zadhazashan|zadhazashan]] || [[word:zadhazakan|zadhazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhazathaoro|zadhazathaoro]] || [[word:zadhazajaoro|zadhazajaoro]] || [[word:zadhazashaoro|zadhazashaoro]] || [[word:zadhazakaoro|zadhazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
